title: Align selected card outline color with hover color
description: Selected card outline should use same color as hover state. Identify hover color token and apply to selected outline styling. AC: selected outline matches hover color; no other card colors change.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Set selected card outline color to hover color by changing issue-card-selected box-shadow to var(--card-muted).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Lowered card-muted token from notch 7 to 6 across neutral/cool/warm themes in console/src/styles/theme.css.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Lowered card-muted token from notch 6 to 5 across neutral/cool/warm themes in console/src/styles/theme.css for lighter hover/selected outline.

custom.beads_notes: Closed: selected outline matches hover color via card-muted notch 5.
